parameters.query: SELECT k.id as keyword_id, k.keyword, dr.position as our_position, dr.ranking_url as our_url FROM web_intel.tracked_keywords k LEFT JOIN web_intel.daily_rankings dr ON k.id = dr.keyword_id AND dr.collected_date = (SELECT MAX(collected_date) FROM web_intel.daily_rankings) WHERE k.status = 'active' ORDER BY k.priority DESC
SELECT keyword, competitor_domain, position FROM web_intel.competitor_rankings WHERE collected_date = (SELECT MAX(collected_date) FROM web_intel.competitor_rankings)

parameters.columns: collected_date, keyword_id, keyword, our_position, our_url, total_competitors_in_top10, our_visibility_score, competitor_positions
